alerts.title: FOMC rate decision — April meeting
alerts.description: Federal Reserve Open Market Committee concludes its April meeting with a rate announcement and Chair press conference. Crypto prices typically track the immediate USD/rates reaction. Statement released at 14:00 ET; press conference 14:30 ET.
alerts.further_info: Watch the statement for any change in language on the balance-sheet runoff pace, and the dot plot for 2026 rate-cut expectations.

alerts.title: FOMC rate decision — June meeting
alerts.description: Federal Reserve Open Market Committee concludes its June meeting. Includes updated Summary of Economic Projections (dot plot).
alerts.further_info: SEP releases at meetings in March, June, September and December.

alerts.title: FOMC rate decision — July meeting
alerts.description: Federal Reserve Open Market Committee concludes its July meeting. No SEP release at this meeting.

alerts.title: FOMC rate decision — September meeting
alerts.description: Federal Reserve Open Market Committee concludes its September meeting. SEP released.

alerts.title: US CPI release — April print
alerts.description: US Bureau of Labor Statistics releases April CPI at 08:30 ET. One of the highest-impact macro data points for crypto; surprise above or below consensus typically moves BTC and ETH within minutes.
alerts.further_info: Consensus tracked at BLS.gov and on financial data terminals; surprise vs consensus is the key signal.

alerts.title: US CPI release — May print
alerts.description: US Bureau of Labor Statistics releases May CPI at 08:30 ET. Watch for trend in core vs headline inflation.

alerts.title: US CPI release — June print
alerts.description: US Bureau of Labor Statistics releases June CPI at 08:30 ET.

alerts.title: Q2 crypto options expiry (Deribit, CME)
alerts.description: Last-Friday-of-quarter options expiry for BTC and ETH on Deribit and CME. Quarterly expiries routinely see ~$10B+ in notional rolling off; gamma unwind around the fix at 08:00 UTC often amplifies short-term volatility.
alerts.further_info: Max-pain strikes are published by Deribit in the days before expiry.

alerts.title: Q3 crypto options expiry (Deribit, CME)
alerts.description: Last-Friday-of-quarter options expiry for BTC and ETH. Typically the largest expiry of the year depending on open interest trends.

alerts.title: SEC spot-ETF decision window opens for 14 newly-classified commodities
alerts.description: Following the March 2026 SEC/CFTC joint Interpretive Release that classified SOL, XRP, ADA, LINK, AVAX, DOT, HBAR, LTC, DOGE, SHIB, XTZ, BCH, APT and XLM as commodities, the first 19b-4 rule-change filings on spot ETFs enter the statutory decision window. Expect a cluster of approvals or extensions through late June.
alerts.further_info: Approvals unlock broad institutional access to a long-tail of majors that have sat on the sidelines since 2024.

alerts.title: US federal stablecoin rules — finalisation deadline
alerts.description: State and federal regulators have until 31 July 2026 to finalise implementation rules under the new US stablecoin framework (1:1 reserves, monthly attestation, OCC oversight for nonbank issuers). Watch for reserve-composition disclosures and issuer restructuring from USDT and USDC.

alerts.title: Ethereum Glamsterdam hard fork — Q2/Q3 2026 target window
alerts.description: Glamsterdam (Glam consensus + Amsterdam execution) is the next major Ethereum hard fork after Fusaka. Client teams are targeting Q2/Q3 2026 with the exact epoch announced closer to activation. Node operators should plan a maintenance window.
alerts.further_info: Scope covers validator-set changes, gas-limit tuning, and further PeerDAS refinements.
